LanguageData.MixedHunterAttacks.MixedAttackChanceTool: Controls the chance that a vanilla manhunter pack becomes a mixed-species Scaria attack. Set to 0% for vanilla behavior.
LanguageData.MixedHunterAttacks.MixedAttackChanceDesc: At 100%, manhunter packs always try to use mixed species. At 0%, vanilla single-species packs are used.
LanguageData.MixedHunterAttacks.AllowQuestOverridesLa: Allow mixed packs for quest manhunter events
LanguageData.MixedHunterAttacks.AllowQuestOverridesTo: Disabled by default. When disabled, quest-generated manhunter events keep the animal kind specified by the quest.
LanguageData.MixedHunterAttacks.ManhunterPackArrivedM: A mixed pack of manhunting animals has entered the area. The group includes {0} and other animals, all driven mad by Scaria.
